login.title: Welcome
login.error_login: Failed to log in. Check your credentials.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_history: No readings yet. Click down below to send your first reading!

reading.title: Send Reading
reading.confirm_message: Do you want to send the following reading?

drawer.remove_profile_content: Are you sure you want to remove this property?

tutorial.menu_desc: Tap here to manage your different properties and user settings.
tutorial.views_desc: Switch between a visual chart and a textual history of your consumption.
tutorial.add_desc: Once you are ready, tap here to submit a new meter reading.
tutorial.reading_input_desc: Enter the current value of your meter here.
tutorial.reading_submit_desc: Tap here to send your reading to EDA.

notification.title: Schedule Reminder?
notification.message: Do you want to schedule a reminder for the next reading of '{}' on {}?

about.title: About
about.open_source: This is an open source application.
about.description: This application was developed to facilitate the process of sending electricity readings to EDA (Empresa de Electricidade dos Açores).
